form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation to post a big 3.5 len win. This track G3 November 2 over 3000m slow track defeating Coco Royale with 60kg at $2.60. When resuming last campaign third in a small field at Dortmund in the G3 Deutsches St. Leger September 21 over 2800m, 4 len behind Caballo De Mar carrying 60kg at $1.60. Can get the job done.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at Milan in the G2 October 19 over 2400m, 1.75 len behind Eydon carrying 59kg at $7.33. When resuming last campaign fourth in a small field at Baden Baden in the G1 Grosser Preis Von Baden September 7 over 2400m, 4 len behind Goliath carrying 60kg at $11.10. Best form gives him a decent chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at Milan in the G2 October 19 over 2400m, 1.75 len behind Eydon carrying 59kg at $7.33. When resuming last campaign fourth in a small field at Baden Baden in the G1 Grosser Preis Von Baden September 7 over 2400m, 4 len behind Goliath carrying 60kg at $11.10. Best form gives him a decent chance.

form.formComment: Entire returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation when last of 8 at Munich in the G1 Grosser Preis Von Bayern November 8 over 2400m, soft track; 42 len behind Bay City Roller with 60kg at $28.60. Previously first up; second last of 8 at Baden Baden in the G2 Grosser Preis der Badischen Wirtschaft June 1 over 2200m, 5.5 len behind Lordano with 57kg at $10.60. Expect a bold showing.

Previously first up; second last of 8 at Baden Baden in the G2 Grosser Preis der Badischen Wirtschaft June 1 over 2200m, 5.5 len behind Lordano with 57kg at $10.60. Expect a bold showing.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Fontainebleau in the LR November 13 over 3000m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Bel Et Bien with 55.5kg at $10. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 4.5 len win. Krefeld May 11 over 2350m defeating Rekabet with 58kg at $3.90. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). First-up. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Fontainebleau in the LR November 13 over 3000m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Bel Et Bien with 55.5kg at $10. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 4.5 len win. Krefeld May 11 over 2350m defeating Rekabet with 58kg at $3.90. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Puts an unbeaten record on the line. Last appeared won by 2 len at Lyon-Parilly May 8 over 2400m on a rain affected track defeating Klycot with 57kg at $3.60. Will find this a bit too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Puts an unbeaten record on the line. Last appeared won by 2 len at Lyon-Parilly May 8 over 2400m on a rain affected track defeating Klycot with 57kg at $3.60. Will find this a bit too tough.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning won by head Baden Baden September 3 over 2400m defeating Zauberkonig carrying 60kg at $1.70. At his first start favourite; won by 1.5 len Hannover May 1 over 2200m defeating Zafirelli with 57kg at $5. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(10). Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning won by head Baden Baden September 3 over 2400m defeating Zauberkonig carrying 60kg at $1.70. At his first start favourite; won by 1.5 len Hannover May 1 over 2200m defeating Zafirelli with 57kg at $5. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Munich November 8 over 2400m, soft track; 23 len behind Alpenjager carrying 60kg at $3.60. Previously first up; second in a small field at Dortmund March 9 2025 over 1700m, 13 len behind Best Lightning carrying 52kg at $3.70. Prefer to see how he returns.
